title: Jack Dorsey wants to take on Slack and GitHub with new Buzz platform bringing humans and agents together
excerpt: Buzz is an open human-AI collaboration app
content_html:
• Jack Dorsey, co-founder of Twitter and Square, launches collaboration app Buzz
  • Buzz is an open platform for humans and AI agents to interact and work
  • The app welcomes AI agents from any provider, including Anthropic and OpenAI

Twitter co-founder Jack Dorsey has launched a new, free collaboration app designed as a shared space for humans and AI agents to collaborate within the same channels and conversations.

Launched under the Block brand (parent company of popular POS app Square), the Buzz app being positioned as a modern and comprehensive alternative to Slack and GitHub.

On the app, agents will have their own profiles, cryptographic identities, channel memberships and permissions, giving them near-human-like capabilities to review or propose code, complete tasks, create channels and coordinate other agents.

Jack Dorsey's Buzz app is a human-AI collaboration space

Importantly, Buzz is set to be an open space that allows connections to any model, including Claude Code, OpenAI Codex and Block's own open-source framework.

"Every company is going to need a place where humans and agents work together," said Block Head of AI Capabilities Bradley Axen said.

From launch, desktop apps for macOS, Windows and Linux are available for Buzz, which is built on Nostr, a "free and open-source protocol for social media and other things" per Nostr's own terminology. That means a decentralized alternative to the likes of Slack, though those Nostr underpinnings do mean a Buzz identity can theoretically travel across other Nostr-compatible systems.

On the privacy front, messages and media on Block-hosted relays aren't end-to-end encrypted, and agent providers like Anthropic and OpenAI may also receive prompts and related channel content. However, organizations can choose to self-host if they need additional security measures.

Sign up to the TechRadar Pro newsletter to get all the top news, opinion, features and guidance your business needs to succeed!

While Buzz isn't alone in looking to tap in on agentic communications – Slack sees itself as an agentic operating system through which AI agents can collaborate and coordinate, too – Dorsey's app tries to take this one step further by being a team chat, project context, agent orchestration and code hosting place all under one roof.

Follow TechRadar on Google News and add us as a preferred source to get our expert news, reviews, and opinion in your feeds.

With several years’ experience freelancing in tech and automotive circles, Craig’s specific interests lie in technology that is designed to better our lives, including AI and ML, productivity aids, and smart fitness. He is also passionate about cars and the decarbonisation of personal transportation. As an avid bargain-hunter, you can be sure that any deal Craig finds is top value!

content_html_zh:
• Twitter 和 Square 联合创始人 Jack Dorsey 推出协作应用程序 Buzz
  • Buzz 是一个供人类和 AI 代理交互和工作的开放平台
  • 该应用程序欢迎来自任何提供商的人工智能代理，包括 Anthropic 和 OpenAI

Twitter 联合创始人 Jack Dorsey 推出了一款新的免费协作应用程序，旨在为人类和人工智能代理在相同的渠道和对话中进行协作提供共享空间。

Buzz 应用程序以 Block 品牌（流行 POS 应用程序 Square 的母公司）推出，被定位为 Slack 和 GitHub 的现代且全面的替代品。

在该应用程序上，代理将拥有自己的个人资料、加密身份、通道成员身份和权限，从而赋予他们类似人类的能力来审查或提出代码、完成任务、创建通道和协调其他代理。

Jack Dorsey 的 Buzz 应用程序是一个人机协作空间

重要的是，Buzz被设置为一个开放空间，允许连接任何模型，包括Claude Code、OpenAI Codex和Block自己的开源框架。

“每家公司都需要一个人类和代理一起工作的地方，”AI 能力区块负责人 Bradley Axen 说。

从发布起，Buzz 就可以使用适用于 macOS、Windows 和 Linux 的桌面应用程序，Buzz 是基于 Nostr 构建的，根据 Nostr 自己的术语，Nostr 是“用于社交媒体和其他事物的免费开源协议”。 这意味着 Slack 之类的去中心化替代方案，尽管这些 Nostr 基础确实意味着 Buzz 身份理论上可以跨其他 Nostr 兼容系统传播。

在隐私方面，块托管中继上的消息和媒体并未进行端到端加密，Anthropic 和 OpenAI 等代理提供商也可能会收到提示和相关频道内容。 但是，如果组织需要额外的安全措施，可以选择自行托管。

订阅 TechRadar Pro 时事通讯，获取您的企业成功所需的所有热门新闻、观点、功能和指导！

虽然 Buzz 并不是唯一一家寻求利用代理通信的公司——Slack 将自己视为一种代理操作系统，人工智能代理也可以通过它进行协作和协调——但 Dorsey 的应用程序试图更进一步，将团队聊天、项目上下文、代理编排和代码托管全部集中在一个屋檐下。

在 Google 新闻上关注 TechRadar，并将我们添加为首选来源，以便在您的 Feed 中获取我们的专家新闻、评论和意见。

克雷格在科技和汽车领域拥有多年的自由职业经验，他的具体兴趣在于旨在改善我们生活的技术，包括人工智能和机器学习、生产力辅助工具和智能健身。 他还热衷于汽车和个人交通的脱碳。 作为一名狂热的讨价还价者，您可以确信克雷格发现的任何交易都是超值的！
